Juni 2026 Beginn: 20:00 Uhr Mama Shelter, Zürich (CH) Come enjoy live stand-up comedy at Color Comedy Open Mic in Zürich! Local and visiting comedians bring laughs, fun, and chaos every Tuesday. Join us for a night of funny stories, jokes, and open mic performances . Hosted by Ruben Garcia (@rubengarciacomedy) and Joana pido(@joana_pido), the show runs every Tuesday night at Mama Shelter Zurich in Oerlikon. Each week features six comedians testing their newest material, followed by a professional headliner who closes the night strong Color Comedy is more than a show. It’s the community at the center of Zürich’s stand-up scene, where comedians and audiences come together every week to create something lively, supportive and genuinely fun. Your Tuesday just found its spark. Event_title: StandUp: Dini Muetter Comedy - Open Mic
Listing_title: StandUp: Dini Muetter Comedy - Open Mic
Description_preview: Comedy StandUp: Dini Muetter Comedy - Open Mic Vior, Zürich Jeden Sonntag im VIOR: Comedy, gute Vibes, Drinks, leckeres Essen (Pizza, Momos, Sushi) und Shisha. Chilliger Abend zum Lachen, Essen, Connecten – für Publikum und Comedians. Sonntagslangeweile? Nicht mit uns! Jeden Sonntag erwartet dich im VIOR ein chilliger Abend mit Comedy, coolen Leuten, Drinks und einer Auswahl an Pizza, Momos und Sushi. Perfekt zum Lachen, Entspannen und Connecten. Ab 15:00 Uhr ist das VIOR offen zum Chillen, Essen und Trinken – komm früh vorbei, schnapp dir einen Drink, geniesse die Vibes und starte entspannt in den Abend. Ab 18:00 Uhr beginnt die Show und das Mikro gehört euch! Egal ob Comedy-Profi, der neues Material testen will, oder Newcomer, der sich zum ersten Mal auf die Bühne wagt – bei uns darf jede*r ans Mikro. Freu dich auf eine abwechslungsreiche Mischung aus frischen Talenten und erfahrenen Comedians in einem Abend voller Überraschungen. Unser Open Mic ist der Spot für alle, die die Kunst des Lachens lieben und ihre Stories auf der Bühne teilen wollen. August 2026 Beginn: 19:00 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) Storytelling is an art from that has evolved with us over millennia. It is in our DNA to share stories. Let's keep this ancient tradition alive in the funkiest way. Join us for an unforgettable evening where laughter intertwines with the strange and the surreal, as comedian Albert Louw and his extraordinary friends share their most captivating tales! Gather with us at the ROBIN'S Bar & Coffee. Admission is free, and while donations are appreciated, what's most important is your presence! Reserve your spot now to ensure you don't miss out on a seat. The show will be hosted by local comedian and everyday storyteller Albert Louw and feature some of Switzerland’s wide variety of storytellers, each telling true stories from all different kinds of backgrounds. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well! Q: Can I perform Comedy also? A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing.
